'''Icanis Tsur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mugaari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. He was killed during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when his ship, the ''[[80-Vag]]'', was destroyed in the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]].
